Aggressively crops the image to center o: Aggressively crops the image to center on the largest face found. Good for portraits.

Automatically check for new versions of: Automatically check for new versions of Spice on startup.
Automatically synchronize your Wallhaven: Automatically synchronize your Wallhaven collections with Spice. New collections will be added as inactive queries.
Browse to a folder on your computer cont: Browse to a folder on your computer containing wallpaper images.

Click the tray icon to download version: Click the tray icon to download version {{.Version}}.

Control how images are fitted to your screen:
- Disabled: Original image.
- Quality: Rejects images with mismatched aspect ratio.
- Flexibility: Allows high-res images to crop aggressively.
Delete all downloaded wallpapers (Source: Delete all downloaded wallpapers (Source and Derivatives). This is a safety feature.
Description must be between 5 and %d alp: Description must be between 5 and %d alpha numeric characters long
Disable if you prefer the wallpaper to c: Disable if you prefer the wallpaper to change only based on its timer or a manual refresh.
Disable this if Alt+Arrow conflicts with: Disable this if Alt+Arrow conflicts with your browser or other apps.

Introduces a random delay when changing: Introduces a random delay when changing wallpapers across multiple screens to prevent a jarring simultaneous flash.

Local favorites are stored persistently: Local favorites are stored persistently in your Spice application folder.
Manage your Pexels image queries here.
Manage your wallhaven.cc image queries a: Manage your wallhaven.cc image queries and collections here. Paste your image search or collection URL and Spice will take care of the rest.

Select the application language. Restart: Select the application language. Restart may be required for full effect.
Set how many images to cache for faster: Set how many images to cache for faster startup and less network usage. Set to "None" to disable caching.
Set how often the wallpaper changes. Set: Set how often the wallpaper changes. Set to "Never" to disable wallpaper changes.
Synchronize Spice with currently connect: Synchronize Spice with currently connected monitors. Use this if you plugged or unplugged a monitor while Spice was running.
The crown jewel of New York City. From a: The crown jewel of New York City. From ancient Egyptian temples to modern masterpieces, The Met houses 5,000 years of humanity's greatest creative achievements.

To continue using Spice, please review a: To continue using Spice, please review and accept the End User License Agreement.
Use keyboard shortcuts to control wallpa: Use keyboard shortcuts to control wallpapers. Disable if they conflict with other apps.
Useful when using image queries with ran: Useful when using image queries with random elements. Toggling this will start or stop the nightly refresh process.
Uses face detection to hint the smart cr: Uses face detection to hint the smart cropper. Keeps faces in frame but balances with other image details.
